cards.title: Rules & Timelines
cards.content:
• Waiting Periods (Initial, Specific, PED)
• Portability (45-Day Rule)
• Pre-Insurance Medical Checks
• Grace Period & Free Look Differences

cards.title: 1. Initial (30 Days)
cards.content:
No illness claims for first 30 days. 
EXCEPTION: Accidents are covered from DAY 1.

cards.title: 2. Specific & PED
cards.content:
Specific Diseases: 1-2 Years (Cataract, Hernia).
Pre-Existing Disease (PED): Usually 48 Months waiting period.

cards.title: The 45-Day Rule
cards.content: Must apply for portability at least 45 DAYS before renewal date. Benefits of completed waiting periods are transferred.

cards.title: Important Difference
cards.content:
Free Look: 15 Days.
Grace Period: 30 Days. 
NOTE: Unlike Life Insurance, claims are NOT payable during the grace period in Health Insurance.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: Claim during Grace Period: NOT payable in Health.
